edits.rationale: Equipment ID 2847.310.0042 has been superseded by 2847.310.0043 in v2.
edits.old_text: This WI applies to all personnel involved in the visual inspection of components produced by the Injection Molding Unit (Asset ID: 2847.420.0023) and the Horizontal CNC Machining Center (Asset ID: 2847.310.0042). It encompasses all products requiring inspection as part of the quality assurance process.
